V-M-038.checks: Shared UI rules must make user and admin surfaces compact, consistent, and readable on mobile screens.
V-M-038.commands: cd frontend && npm run build; cd ../frontend-admin && npm run build

module-checks.check-3: Compact UI rules avoid nested cards, oversized dashboard sections, decorative clutter, and horizontal scroll.
module-checks.check-4: Buttons, lists, tabs, dialogs, and confirmations have stable mobile dimensions.

scenarios.scenario-1: Both frontends share compact layout rules while preserving domain-specific workflows.
scenarios.scenario-2: A redesigned screen remains card-heavy, desktop-first, or text-overlapping on phones.
